title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Programme Coordinator
shortInfo: Kalyani University Recruitment 2026 notification released for Programme Coordinator (NSS) post. Eligible candidates can apply offline through the official website, klyuniv.ac.in, and submit the application form on or before 05 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Kalyani University Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Kalyani University Recruitment 2026 notification released for Programme Coordinator (NSS) post. Eligible candidates can apply offline through the official website, klyuniv.ac.in, and submit the application form on or before 05 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Kalyani University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Associate Professor (Level-13A)/Assistant Professor (Level 11) or equivalent in a university, Served as Programme Officer under NSS for at least three
qualification.details: Associate Professor (Level-13A)/Assistant Professor (Level 11) or equivalent in a university. Must have served as a Programme Officer under NSS for at least three (03) years. Must have successfully completed NSS Orientation Course in a TOC/TORC.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://klyuniv.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Kalyani University Programme Coordinator (NSS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Kalyani University Programme Coordinator (NSS) recruitment is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Programme Coordinator (NSS) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Programme Coordinator (NSS) post is 50 years.

faq.question: What are the essential qualifications required for the Programme Coordinator (NSS) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be an Associate Professor or Assistant Professor equivalent, have served as a Programme Officer under NSS for at least three years, and completed the NSS Orientation Course.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the job type for the Programme Coordinator (NSS) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Programme Coordinator (NSS) position is contract-based.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Kalyani University: https://klyuniv.ac.in/.

faq.question: How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form along with required documents should be sent by post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the official website of Kalyani University?
faq.answer: The official website of Kalyani University is https://klyuniv.ac.in/.
